summary: Narrated USCIS public service announcement explaining the Alien Registration Requirement under Trump's EO 14159: who must register, the 14-and-older threshold, and the criminal and civil penalties for non-compliance. It uses stock B-roll (border checkpoint, fingerprint, classroom, person typing) under a full voiceover with large white caption text and an ARR logo end card. It uses spoken narration with no music track. On-screen text reads 'Security is making sure all aliens', '14 years or older', 'If you are a parent', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION', and 'and civil penalties.'.
notable_text: Security is making sure all aliens; 14 years or older; If you are a parent; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION; and civil penalties.
